allow: Bash(mysql -uroot -proot -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS khiva_tour CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;")
Bash(mysql -uroot -proot khiva_tour -e "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS cache, cache_locks, job_batches, jobs, failed_jobs, sessions, password_reset_tokens, personal_access_tokens, users, migrations;")

Bash(mysql -uroot -proot khiva_tour -e "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS conversations, guests, guest_houses, users, sessions, password_reset_tokens, cache, cache_locks, failed_jobs, job_batches, jobs, migrations;")
Bash(mysql -uroot -proot khiva_tour -se "SELECT qr_token FROM guest_houses LIMIT 1;")
